scripts.dev: bash -lc 'bash ../../scripts/dev/with-elixir-env.sh . -- mix ecto.migrate && exec bash ../../scripts/dev/with-elixir-env.sh . -- iex -S mix phx.server'
scripts.test:run: MIX_ENV=test bash ../../scripts/dev/with-elixir-env.sh . -- mix do compile --warnings-as-errors + test --warnings-as-errors
scripts.check: bash ../../scripts/dev/with-elixir-env.sh . -- mix format --check-formatted && MIX_ENV=test bash ../../scripts/dev/with-elixir-env.sh . -- mix do compile --warnings-as-errors + test --warnings-as-errors
